rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER RE THE PEARL RESNICK 2003 LIVING TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Petitioners Cynthia Renee Abrams And Douglas Mark Resnick To Compel The Deposition Of Respondent Gregory Russell Resnick And To Compel Response To Petitioners' Request For Production Of Documents And To Compel Production Of Documents; And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Gregory Russell Resnick
rulings.Rulings: Motion of Cynthia Renee Abrams and Douglas Mark Resnick to Compel the Deposition of Respondent Gregory Russell Resnick and to Compel Response to Petitioners¿ Requests for Production of Documents and to Compel Production of Documents and Request for Monetary Sanctions. Tentative ruling: Grant ¿ no opposition 1. Gregory Resnick must verify his written responses to the Requests for Production of Documents within 10 days of service of written notice of entry of order; 2. Produce all documents responsive to the Requests for Production of Documents within 10 days of service of written notice of entry of order; 3. Sit for deposition at a date to be set by Petitioners by written notice, such deposition to be within 30 days of service of written notice of entry of order; and 4. Gregory Resnick is sanctioned $1,770.00 attorneys fees + $40.00 for Petitioner¿s costs related to the discovery motion. Total discovery sanction is $1,810.00. Moving party to submit a proposed order. If any party wishes to contest the tentative ruling, they must contact the probate courtroom clerk at (415) 551-3702 and opposing counsel no later than 4:00 p.m. on July 27, 2011.
